research_basis: Outcome requirements should be measurable and suitable for evaluation.
ISO/IEC 25010:2023 provides a product quality reference model for specifying and evaluating quality.
Policy-as-code guidance supports encoding requirements as testable gates.
rules: At least one outcome is required.
At least one measurable success criterion is required.
At least one blocking success criterion is required.
Measurable success criteria must include metric, threshold, and verification method.
Thresholds may not be TBD, N/A, unknown, or deferred.
At least one failure criterion is required.
